channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Clippers' Kawhi Leonard upgraded to questionable, could make season debut Saturday against Atlanta
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Kawhi Leonard evidently is ready to play basketball again. The Los Angeles Clippers upgraded Leonard from out to questionable on their injury report Friday night, indicating that he may make his season debut Saturday when the team plays host to the Atlanta Hawks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: After Astros talks with Bregman ‘stalled,’ 3 teams emerge as serious suitors
item.description: The Detroit Tigers, Boston Red Sox and Toronto Blue Jays have emerged as three suitors with a “very, very real” possibility of landing Gold Glove third baseman Alex Bregman, a league source told KPRC 2.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Detroit Pistons to honor Chauncey ‘Mr. Big Shot’ Billups with special tribute during Portland game
item.description: The Detroit Pistons will honor Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame guard Chauncey “Mr. Big Shot” Billups when his Portland Trail Blazers visit Little Caesars Arena.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Allstate deletes social media post of CEO's controversial Sugar Bowl message amid backlash
item.description: Following the backlash Allstate CEO Tom Wilson faced over his comments in response to the New Orleans terror attack, the company appeared to delete the message from its social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rugby star Ilona Maher eyes Bristol debut as ticket sales break club record
item.description: BRISTOL, England (AP) — Ticket sales have broken a record ahead of U.S. rugby star Ilona Maher making her debut for the Bristol Bears women's team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baker Mayfield's success in Tampa Bay has turned him into a coach-builder
item.description: Baker Mayfield revived his career in Tampa Bay and became a coach-builder in the process. Mayfield’s success with the Buccaneers in 2023 helped Dave Canales become head coach of the Carolina Panthers after just one season as an offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, WFLA, NBC

item.title: After Bay FC’s record-setting first season, CEO Brady Stewart sees a movement coming in women’s sports
item.description: Bay FC set a record for most wins (11) by an NWSL expansion club while averaging more than 14,000 fans, ranking No. 3 in ticket revenue, No. 4 in average attendance and No. 1 in merchandise sales.
item.dc:creator: Jason Mastrodonato, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets interview former Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job
item.description: The New York Jets interviewed former Tennessee Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching vacancy.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ESPN doesn't show national anthem, U-S-A chants ahead of Sugar Bowl after New Orleans terror attack
item.description: ESPN is facing criticism after not broadcasting the national anthem prior to the start of the Sugar Bowl game between Georgia and Notre Dame on Thursday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CFP semifinals by the numbers: All four teams are members of the exclusive 900-win club
item.description: The College Football Playoff expanded to 12 teams to get some new blood. The final four are decidedly blueblood. The semifinals match Penn State against Notre Dame at the Orange Bowl on Jan. 9 and Texas against Ohio State in the Cotton Bowl on Jan. 10.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James applauds younger son Bryce's hoops commitment to the University of Arizona
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is applauding the decision made by his son, Bryce, to play basketball at the University of Arizona next season.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Another slow start by Bucks leaves Antetokounmpo in no mood to celebrate his latest record
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo didn’t want to talk about the latest record the Milwaukee Bucks star added to his collection Thursday night. The two-time MVP instead was focused on figuring how the Bucks could stop their recent pattern of making things tough on themselves early in games.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Angel Reese shows off revealing New Year's Eve outfit, deletes Instagram account
item.description: It's not clear how Angel Reese spent New Year's Eve, but wherever she was, she was showing it off with a eye-popping outfit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Postponed Sugar Bowl played with enhanced security about 36 hours after terror attack in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Georgia and Notre Dame fans packed a plaza adjacent to the Superdome and enjoyed music under clear skies — under the watch of snipers on rooftops — before filtering into the stadium for Thursday's College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl. “It was a lot of fun.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Illinois holds off South Carolina in Citrus Bowl for first 10-win season since 2001
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Josh McCray scored his second touchdown of the game on a 9-yard run midway through the fourth quarter to give No. 21 Illinois the lead, and the Illini held on to beat No. 14 South Carolina, 21-17, in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers trade former All-Star to Brooklyn
item.description: For the second time in his NBA career, D'Angelo Russell has been traded from the Los Angeles Lakers to the Brooklyn Nets.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
